display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official duo-labs/parliament repository using the project name Parliament.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for Parliament.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies AWS IAM linting; source_facts.executables indicates command-line usage.
